title: Advertisement for Overseas Employment. Advertisements for overseas
content: 54 employment shall include the publication of job vacancies in any form of communication, 55 such as, but not limited to, press releases, printed materials, or advertisements in radio, 56 television, cinemas, internet, social media and other electronic forms, billboards, moving 57 and human advertisements, and ad boards. 58 59
